lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਜੰ ਤ ਮਾਨੰ ਅਭਿਮਾਨੰ ਤ ਹੀਨੰ ॥
lines.translit: raajan ta maanan abhimaanan ta heenan |
lines.english: If there is power, then there is pride. If there is egotistical pride, then there will be a fall.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਵਿਰਤਿ ਮਾਰਗੰ ਵਰਤੰਤਿ ਬਿਨਾਸਨੰ ॥
lines.translit: pravirat maaragan varatant binaasanan |
lines.english: Engrossed in worldly ways, one is ruined.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਭਜਨ ਸਾਧ ਸੰਗੇਣ ਅਸਥਿਰੰ ਨਾਨਕ ਭਗਵੰਤ ਭਜਨਾਸਨੰ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: gobind bhajan saadh sangen asathiran naanak bhagavant bhajanaasanan |12|
lines.english: Meditating and vibrating on the Lord of the Universe in the Company of the Holy, you shall become steady and stable. Nanak vibrates and meditates on the Lord God. ||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਰਪੰਤ ਹਰੀਅੰ ਮਤਿ ਤਤੁ ਗਿਆਨੰ ॥
lines.translit: kirapant hareean mat tat giaanan |
lines.english: By the Grace of God, genuine understanding comes to the mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਗਸੀਧੵਿ ਬੁਧਾ ਕੁਸਲ ਥਾਨੰ ॥
lines.translit: bigaseedhay budhaa kusal thaanan |
lines.english: The intellect blossoms forth, and one finds a place in the realm of celestial bliss.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੀਤਲੰਤ ਰਿਦਯੰ ਦ੍ਰਿੜੁ ਸੰਤ ਗਿਆਨੰ ॥
lines.translit: seetalant ridayan drirr sant giaanan |
lines.english: The heart is cooled and soothed, and the wisdom of the Saints is implanted within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਸੵਿੰਤ ਰਿਖਿਅੰ ਤਿਆਗਿ ਮਾਨੰ ॥
lines.translit: basayint rikhian tiaag maanan |
lines.english: The senses are brought under control, and pride is abandoned.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਹੰਤ ਜਨਮੰ ਹਰਿ ਦਰਸ ਲੀਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: rahant janaman har daras leenaa |
lines.english: Reincarnation is ended, and the Blessed Vision of the Lord's Darshan is obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਜੰਤ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਬਦ ਬੀਣਾਂ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: baajant naanak sabad beenaan |13|
lines.english: O Nanak, the musical instrument of the Word of the Shabad vibrates and resounds within. ||13||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੰਤ ਬੇਦਾ ਗੁਣੰਤ ਗੁਨੀਆ ਸੁਣੰਤ ਬਾਲਾ ਬਹੁ ਬਿਧਿ ਪ੍ਰਕਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: kahant bedaa gunant guneea sunant baalaa bahu bidh prakaaraa |
lines.english: The Vedas preach and recount God's Glories; people hear them by various ways and means.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮ ਦਾਨੁ ਜਾਚੰਤ ਨਾਨਕ ਦੈਨਹਾਰ ਗੁਰ ਗੋਪਾਲਾ ॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: naam daan jaachant naanak dainahaar gur gopaalaa |14|
lines.english: Nanak begs for the Gift of the Naam, the Name of the Lord. The Guru is the Great Giver, the Lord of the World. ||14||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦ੍ਰਿੜੰਤ ਸੁਬਿਦਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: drirrant subidiaa har har kripaalaa |
lines.english: The Merciful Lord, Har, Har, implants spiritual wisdom within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਹ ਚਿੰਤਾ ਬਨਿਤਾ ਸੁਤ ਮੀਤਹ ਪ੍ਰਵਿਰਤਿ ਮਾਇਆ ਸਨਬੰਧਨਹ ॥
lines.translit: neh chintaa banitaa sut meetah pravirat maaeaa sanabandhanah |
lines.english: Do not worry about your spouse, children and friends. You are obsessed with your involvements in Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਹ ਚਿੰਤਾ ਮਾਤ ਪਿਤ ਭ੍ਰਾਤਹ ਨਹ ਚਿੰਤਾ ਕਛੁ ਲੋਕ ਕਹ ॥
lines.translit: neh chintaa maat pit bhraatah neh chintaa kachh lok kah |
lines.english: Do not worry so much about your mother, father and siblings. Do not worry so much about other people.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਇਆਲ ਏਕ ਭਗਵਾਨ ਪੁਰਖਹ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਰਬ ਜੀਅ ਪ੍ਰਤਿਪਾਲਕਹ ॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: deaal ek bhagavaan purakhah naanak sarab jeea pratipaalakah |15|
lines.english: The One Lord God is Kind and Compassionate, O Nanak. He is the Cherisher and Nurturer of all living beings. ||15||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਿਤੵ ਵਿਤੰ ਅਨਿਤੵ ਚਿਤੰ ਅਨਿਤੵ ਆਸਾ ਬਹੁ ਬਿਧਿ ਪ੍ਰਕਾਰੰ ॥
lines.translit: anitay vitan anitay chitan anitay aasaa bahu bidh prakaaran |
lines.english: Wealth is temporary; conscious existence is temporary; hopes of all sorts are temporary.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਿਤੵ ਹੇਤੰ ਅਹੰ ਬੰਧੰ ਭਰਮ ਮਾਇਆ ਮਲਨੰ ਬਿਕਾਰੰ ॥
lines.translit: anitay hetan ahan bandhan bharam maaeaa malanan bikaaran |
lines.english: The bonds of love, attachment, egotism, doubt, Maya and the pollution of corruption are temporary.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੇ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਕਰਤ ਮਇਆ ਨਾਨਕ ਪਤਿਤ ਉਧਾਰਣ ਸਾਧ ਸੰਗਮਹ ॥੧੬॥
lines.translit: he gobind karat meaa naanak patit udhaaran saadh sangamah |16|
lines.english: O Lord of the Universe, when You grant Your Grace, even sinners are saved. Nanak dwells in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy. ||16||

lines.gurmukhi: ਫਿਰੰਤ ਜੋਨਿ ਅਨੇਕ ਜਠਰਾਗਨਿ ਨਹ ਸਿਮਰੰਤ ਮਲੀਣ ਬੁਧੵੰ ॥
lines.translit: firant jon anek jattharaagan neh simarant maleen budhayan |
lines.english: The mortal passes through the fire of the womb of reincarnation countless times. He does not remember the Lord in meditation; his understanding is polluted.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਿਰੰਤ ਗਿਰਿ ਪਤਿਤ ਪਾਤਾਲੰ ਜਲੰਤ ਦੇਦੀਪੵ ਬੈਸ੍ਵਾਂਤਰਹ ॥
lines.translit: girant gir patit paataalan jalant dedeepay baisvaantarah |
lines.english: You may drop down from the mountains, and fall into the nether regions of the underworld, or be burnt in the blazing fire,

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਿਕ ਸਾਧਨੰ ਨ ਸਿਧੵਤੇ ਨਾਨਕ ਅਸਥੰਭੰ ਅਸਥੰਭੰ ਅਸਥੰਭੰ ਸਬਦ ਸਾਧ ਸ੍ਵਜਨਹ ॥੧੭॥
lines.translit: anik saadhanan na sidhayate naanak asathanbhan asathanbhan asathanbhan sabad saadh svajanah |17|
lines.english: No matter what you do, you cannot break its bonds, O Nanak. Man's only Support, Anchor and Mainstay is the Word of the Shabad, and the Holy, Friendly Saints. ||17||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਹੰਤਿ ਅਗਾਹ ਤੋਯੰ ਤਰੰਗੰ ਦੁਖੰਤ ਗ੍ਰਹ ਚਿੰਤਾ ਜਨਮੰ ਤ ਮਰਣਹ ॥
lines.translit: bahant agaah toyan tarangan dukhant grah chintaa janaman ta maranah |
lines.english: or swept away by the unfathomable waves of water; but the worst pain of all is household anxiety, which is the source of the cycle of death and rebirth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘੋਰ ਦੁਖੵੰ ਅਨਿਕ ਹਤੵੰ ਜਨਮ ਦਾਰਿਦ੍ਰੰ ਮਹਾ ਬਿਖੵਾਦੰ ॥
lines.translit: ghor dukhayan anik hatayan janam daaridran mahaa bikhayaadan |
lines.english: Excruciating pain, countless killings, reincarnation, poverty and terrible misery

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਧਕਾਰ ਸਿਮਰਤ ਪ੍ਰਕਾਸੰ ਗੁਣ ਰਮੰਤ ਅਘ ਖੰਡਨਹ ॥
lines.translit: andhakaar simarat prakaasan gun ramant agh khanddanah |
lines.english: Meditating in remembrance on the Lord, the darkness is illuminated. Dwelling on His Glorious Praises, the ugly sins are destroyed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਟੰਤ ਸਗਲ ਸਿਮਰੰਤ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮ ਨਾਨਕ ਜੈਸੇ ਪਾਵਕ ਕਾਸਟ ਭਸਮੰ ਕਰੋਤਿ ॥੧੮॥
lines.translit: mittant sagal simarant har naam naanak jaise paavak kaasatt bhasaman karot |18|
lines.english: are all destroyed by meditating in remembrance on the Lord's Name, O Nanak, just as fire reduces piles of wood to ashes. ||18||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮ ਮਰਣ ਰਹੰਤ ਸ੍ਰੋਤਾ ਸੁਖ ਸਮੂਹ ਅਮੋਘ ਦਰਸਨਹ ॥
lines.translit: janam maran rahant srotaa sukh samooh amogh darasanah |
lines.english: The cycle of coming and going in reincarnation is ended, absolute peace is obtained, and the Fruitful Vision of the Lord's Darshan.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਿਦ ਬਸੰਤਿ ਭੈ ਭੀਤ ਦੂਤਹ ਕਰਮ ਕਰਤ ਮਹਾ ਨਿਰਮਲਹ ॥
lines.translit: rid basant bhai bheet dootah karam karat mahaa niramalah |
lines.english: Enshrining the Lord deep within the heart, and with the immaculate karma of doing good deeds, one strikes fear into the demons.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਣਿ ਜੋਗੰ ਸੰਤ ਪ੍ਰਿਅ ਨਾਨਕ ਸੋ ਭਗਵਾਨ ਖੇਮੰ ਕਰੋਤਿ ॥੧੯॥
lines.translit: saran jogan sant pria naanak so bhagavaan kheman karot |19|
lines.english: He is Potent to give Protection, He is the Lover of His Saints. O Nanak, the Lord God blesses all with bliss. ||19||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਛੰ ਕਰੋਤਿ ਅਗ੍ਰਣੀਵਹ ਨਿਰਾਸੰ ਆਸ ਪੂਰਨਹ ॥
lines.translit: paachhan karot agraneevah niraasan aas pooranah |
lines.english: Those who were left behind - the Lord brings them to the front. He fulfills the hopes of the hopeless.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰਧਨ ਭਯੰ ਧਨਵੰਤਹ ਰੋਗੀਅੰ ਰੋਗ ਖੰਡਨਹ ॥
lines.translit: niradhan bhayan dhanavantah rogeean rog khanddanah |
lines.english: He makes the poor rich, and cures the illnesses of the ill.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤੵੰ ਭਗਤਿ ਦਾਨੰ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮ ਗੁਣ ਕੀਰਤਨਹ ॥
lines.translit: bhagatayan bhagat daanan raam naam gun keeratanah |
lines.english: He blesses His devotees with devotion. They sing the Kirtan of the Praises of the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਪੁਰਖ ਦਾਤਾਰਹ ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰ ਸੇਵਾ ਕਿੰ ਨ ਲਭੵਤੇ ॥੨੦॥
lines.translit: paarabraham purakh daataarah naanak gur sevaa kin na labhayate |20|
lines.english: O Nanak, those who serve the Guru find the Supreme Lord God, the Great Giver||20||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਾਥ ਨਾਥ ਗੋਬਿੰਦਹ ਬਲਹੀਣ ਬਲ ਕੇਸਵਹ ॥
lines.translit: anaath naath gobindah balaheen bal kesavah |
lines.english: The Lord of the Universe is the Master of the masterless; the Beautiful-haired Lord is the Power of the weak.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਧਰੰ ਧਰੰ ਧਾਰਣਹ ਨਿਰਧਨੰ ਧਨ ਨਾਮ ਨਰਹਰਹ ॥
lines.translit: adharan dharan dhaaranah niradhanan dhan naam naraharah |
lines.english: He gives Support to the unsupported. The Name of the Lord is the Wealth of the poor.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਬਗੵ ਪੂਰਨ ਪੁਰਖ ਭਗਵਾਨਹ ਭਗਤਿ ਵਛਲ ਕਰੁਣਾ ਮਯਹ ॥
lines.translit: sarabagay pooran purakh bhagavaanah bhagat vachhal karunaa mayah |
lines.english: The All-knowing, Perfect, Primal Lord God is the Lover of His devotees, the Embodiment of Mercy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਬ ਭੂਤ ਦਯਾਲ ਅਚੁਤ ਦੀਨ ਬਾਂਧਵ ਦਾਮੋਦਰਹ ॥
lines.translit: sarab bhoot dayaal achut deen baandhav daamodarah |
lines.english: The Lord is Merciful to all beings, Eternal and Unchanging, the Family of the meek and humble.
